assertions.title: Tool call command executions rendered in chat
testNames: command execution blocks appear in chat during streaming

assertions.title: Full E2E flow
testNames: full flow: render → type message → streaming → finalized message

assertions.title: Background status updates don't disrupt chat
testNames: sidebar updates while chat is active without disruption
sidebar updates do not clear streaming text

assertions.title: API error during active chat doesn't crash
testNames: API error during active chat doesn't crash the app

assertions.title: Command execution blocks during streaming
testNames: command execution blocks appear in chat during streaming

frictions.description: The describe label 'Agent status updates during chat (VAL-TUI-CROSS-002)' in integration.test.tsx covers assertions mapped in the contract as VAL-TUI-CROSS-003 and VAL-TUI-CROSS-004; mapping required using exact test names rather than describe label.
frictions.resolution: Mapped each assigned assertion by exact test case name and behavior from validation-contract.md.
